assignments.label: Assign Quality Control Data- Change Owner

assignments.name: Assign_Quality_Control_Data_Notification_Sent_Manager
assignments.label: Assign Quality Control Data- Notification Sent Manager

assignments.name: Assign_Quality_Control_Data_Notification_Sent_Related_User
assignments.label: Assign Quality Control Data- Notification Sent Related User

assignments.name: Assign_Quality_Control_Data_Update_QC_Source
assignments.label: Assign Quality Control Data- Update QC Source

assignments.name: Update_Quality_Control_Data_Patient_Account_From_Appointment
assignments.label: Update Quality Control Data- Patient Account From Appointment

assignments.name: Update_Quality_Control_Data_Patient_Account_From_Case
assignments.label: Update Quality Control Data- Patient Account From Case

assignments.name: Update_Quality_Control_Data_Satisfaction_Score_Lowered
assignments.label: Update Quality Control Data- Satisfaction Score Lowered

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: ⚠️ יש לשים לב- לא מוגדר לך מנהל. יש להוסיף מנהל ברשומת המשתמש שלך בשדה "רשיונות" (manager) ולאחר מכן לחזור על התהליך. ⚠️

customErrors.description: אם לא נמצאו אחראים על פניות הציבור אין למי לשלוח notification אז ההודעה הזו תעלה
customErrors.name: No_Public_Inquiries_Admins_Found
customErrors.label: No Public Inquiries Admins Found

customErrorMessages.errorMessage: 🚩 לא נמצא משתמש פעיל שמוגדר כראש צוות פניות הציבור ולכן לא תישלח הודעה (notification) לראש הצוות. לפחות אחד מנציגי פניות הציבור צריך להיות מוגדר "ראש צוות פניות הציבור" (User.title = ראש צוות פניות הציבור) *

decisions.description: added check - in not found no notifications will be sent and custom error will be displayed
decisions.name: Found_Public_Inquiries_Admin
decisions.label: Found Public Inquiries Admin?

decisions.name: Is_Status_Handled_By_Direct_Manager
decisions.label: Is Status Handled By Direct Manager?

rules.name: Yes_Status_Handled_By_Direct_Manager
rules.label: Yes- Status Handled By Direct Manager

rules.name: Close_QC_On_Account_From_Case
rules.label: Close QC On Account From Case

rules.name: Close_QC_On_Account_From_Appointment
rules.label: Close QC On Account From Appointment

decisions.name: Send_Notification_To_The_User_Manager
decisions.label: Send Notification To The User Manager?

Flow.description:
Migrated from the בקרת איכות - שינוי בעלים process using multiple criteria. שינוי בעלי הבקרה כאשר סטטוסים מועברים
AM: 20112025- 2508485040 - refactor only after conversion from PB for issue שליחת סקר - התאמת מכשיר CPAP AM: 17122025- SN- INC0033110- if running user has manager on his user record. AM: 23122025- 2585784781- changing the properties for get public inquiries administrators

formulas.name: fCalculateSatisfactionScore
formulas.expression: IF (ISPICKVAL({!$Record.SLA__c}, "ירוק"), IF({!Get_Related_Account.satisfaction__c} -10 > 0, {!Get_Related_Account.satisfaction__c} -10,0), IF (ISPICKVAL({!$Record.SLA__c}, "כתום"), IF({!Get_Related_Account.satisfaction__c} -20>0,{!Get_Related_Account.satisfaction__c} -20,0), IF (ISPICKVAL({!$Record.SLA__c}, "אדום"), IF({!Get_Related_Account.satisfaction__c} -30>0,{!Get_Related_Account.satisfaction__c} -30,0), 0)))

Flow.label: Triggered- Quality Control- Create Or Update- After Save
